title: oxalis eckloniana
intro: Oxalis eckloniana, also known as the Cape sorrel or sorrel oxalis, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family Oxalidaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high levels of oxalic acid, which has antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oxalis eckloniana include its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, as well as its possible role in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Oxalis eckloniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
